zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bettenham於大約1465年出生在英國肯特普盧可利時，她的父親John Bettenham32歲，母親Anne FitzHerbert22歲。她於大約1488年與James Wilford在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1540年在英國英格蘭肯特享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bettenham于大约1465年出生在英国肯特普盧可利时，她的父亲John Bettenham32岁，母亲Anne FitzHerbert22岁。她于大约1488年与James Wilford在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1540年在英国英格兰肯特享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bettenham was born about 1465, in Pluckley, Kent, England, her father, John Bettenham, was 32 and her mother, Anne FitzHerbert, was 22. She married James Wilford about 1488, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1540, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bettenham est née environ 1465, à Pluckley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Bettenham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne FitzHerbert, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé James Wilford environ 1488, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1540, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

Sie hat um 1488 in England James Wilford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1540 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato James Wilford circa 1488, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1540, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bettenhamが約1465年にイギリスケントプルックリーで生まれた時，父John Bettenhamは32歳，母Anne FitzHerbertは22歳であった。約1488年にイギリスでJames Wilfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1540年にイギリスイギリスケントで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bettenham(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 켄트 플럭리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bettenham(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne FitzHerbert(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1488년 영국에서 James Wilford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bettenham nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Pluckley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bettenham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne FitzHerbert, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com James Wilford aproximadamente 1488, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1540, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bettenham родилась около 1465 г. в местности плуккли, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bettenham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne FitzHerbert, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Wilford около 1488 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1540 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
